title: Performance Optimization Audit
description: Conducted a comprehensive performance audit of the main web application, identifying and remediating 12 critical performance bottlenecks.

title: Accessibility Compliance Audit
description: Performed WCAG 2.1 AA audit across all product pages. Remediated 45 accessibility issues across 8 core page templates.

title: Security Dependency Audit
description: Audited 200+ direct and transitive dependencies for security vulnerabilities. Upgraded 35 packages and removed 8 deprecated dependencies.

title: Bundle Size Analysis
description: Analyzed JavaScript bundle composition using webpack-bundle-analyzer. Identified and eliminated 400KB of dead code through tree-shaking improvements.

title: API Performance Audit
description: Audited 25 API endpoints for response times and error rates. Optimized N+1 queries and implemented Redis caching for high-traffic endpoints.
